name: Mask Saturated Pixels in Science Image
description: Scientific CCD detectors have a limited full-well capacity. When pixels become saturated, they must be masked out to prevent errors in downstream analysis. Using the FITS image provided at `~/AstroImages/quality_control/science_raw.fits`, identify all pixels with an ADU count greater than or equal to 55000 and replace their values with exactly 0, ensuring all other pixels remain unchanged. Save the modified image to `~/AstroImages/processed/science_masked.fits` and create a text report at `~/AstroImages/processed/mask_report.txt` containing the line `masked_pixel_count: <number>` where `<number>` is the total count of pixels masked. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
